mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, name, gender, phone, department_id, title, specialty, introduction, status, create_time, update_time FROM doctor WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, user_id, name, gender, phone, department_id, title, specialty, introduction, status, create_time, update_time FROM doctor WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT id, user_id, name, gender, phone, department_id, title, specialty, introduction, status, create_time, update_time FROM doctor WHERE department_id = #{departmentId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO doctor (user_id, name, gender, phone, department_id, title, specialty, introduction, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{departmentId}, #{title}, #{specialty}, #{introduction}, COALESCE(#{status}, 1), NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE doctor SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
